title: EvidenceRecord
description: A single provenance-stamped piece of evidence ingested from a provider. Research-only: an EvidenceRecord describes an observation and never authorizes or triggers any financial action. See docs/verification_policy.md and docs/provider_strategy.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record conforms to.

evidence_id.description: Stable unique id for this evidence record (referenced by BeliefCard.related_evidence_ids and evidence_for/against).

source_id.description: Identifier of the provider/source the datum came from.

source_type.description: Kind of source. 'derived' and 'model_generated' must carry lower extraction_confidence and may set uncertainty flags downstream.

source_uri.description: Optional locator for the source (URL or internal reference). Must not contain secrets or credentials.

observed_at.description: When the underlying datum was observed/fetched (provenance timestamp).

freshness_status.description: Freshness relative to the data's acceptable age for its use.

reliability_tier.description: Source reliability, tier_1 = most reliable. Used by verification and uncertainty assessment.

independence_group.description: Label grouping sources that are NOT independent of each other (shared upstream, syndication, same vendor feed). Two evidence items with the same independence_group must not be counted as independent corroboration.

extracted_claims.description: Discrete claims extracted from the source.

stance.description: How the claim relates to the object under study. Research framing only; never an action directive.

confidence.description: Confidence this claim is correctly represented (0-1).

extraction_confidence.description: Confidence that extraction faithfully represents the source (0-1).

notes.description: Free-text analyst notes. No secrets or personal financial account data.

updated_at.description: When this record was last updated.
